data.body:
life's vicissitudes,
writing with aphanstasia,
feeling more than seeing.

holding space while you heal,
expressing long-winded poems,
expecting one-word replies.

walking on water,
for a perfect imperfection,
a herculean task.

#emoetry Herculean @mwplovesmusic.bsky.social

data.body: I may be in the minority in thinking AI has a role in mental healthcare, but this is horrifying to me. AI has huge potential for processing grief, for finding closure, but this isn't that.
